project_type: Flutter mobile/web/desktop chat app with FastAPI backend
build_system: Flutter SDK with pub, json_serializable for code generation
build_command: flutter build apk --debug (or flutter analyze for static analysis)
verification_instructions: Run flutter analyze in the frontend/ directory to confirm no static analysis errors. The project uses json_serializable with build_runner for generated code - after modifying message_model.dart, the .g.dart file must also be updated.
snapshot_or_generated_files: frontend/lib/data/models/message_model.g.dart - generated by build_runner (dart run build_runner build). Must be updated when message_model.dart fields change.
environment_constraints: No device/emulator available for running the app. Validation via flutter analyze only. build_runner may not run if dependencies are missing - manually updating .g.dart is acceptable.
contribution_requirements: Strict null safety, no dynamic types, separate UI from business logic, DM Sans body font, DM Serif Display headings, Persian Orange #CC5801 sparingly, error handling on every function, no commented-out code, constants instead of magic numbers.
key_patterns: Widgets use StatefulWidget with SingleTickerProviderStateMixin for animations. AppColors constants for light/dark theming. MioAnimations for standard durations/curves. GoogleFonts.dmSans for body text. Riverpod StateProvider for state management. ChatService handles SSE streaming via Dio. ChatRepository orchestrates state providers. json_serializable with @JsonSerializable() annotation for models.
directory_structure: frontend/lib/core/ (constants, utils), frontend/lib/data/ (models, services, repositories), frontend/lib/presentation/ (screens, widgets). Chat widgets in presentation/widgets/chat/.
